title: codereview-1: SFN delta section P2 test vector refs incomplete
description: After first edit chunk to SFN modulo section in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:376+, remaining references to nonexistent test/vectors/sfn-delta.json persist at top-level (line ~29, 364, 505). Update all to point to ccp16-desync.json:desync_on_sfn_wrap and ccp_load_balancing.json. Also P4: inconsistent spacing in 'delta=1' vs 'delta = 1'; use RFC 1982 full citation. Tagged codereview.
